global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with product displays and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection with a limited-time offer.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background that fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and warm base for the ad.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A simple illustration of three rectangular shapes resembling product packaging, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: Another rectangular shape, slightly larger, representing a product, positioned to the right of the previous element.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A third rectangular shape, similar in size to the second, positioned to the right of the second product display.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular shape located below the product displays, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: Another small circular shape, similar to the previous one, positioned next to it for symmetry.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'New collection drop Only this weekend' prominently displayed at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Only this weekend

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A white button with the text '€29.99 Book now' that stands out against the orange background, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'BoltCart' in bold black text, positioned at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the text 'SALE' in black, located at the top right corner of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, new collection, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the bottom, the product displays are centered, and the CTA is below the headline.
